name: SMG4 Crew RP
description:
Yep, I'm back with a new RP bot for y'all to enjoy! (The Meta Runner one is still up incase y'all want to check it out still, it's not the best but all power to you if you want it. Meta Runner RP. )

Now enjoy whenever you want! (More Characters may get added later on, idk.)

(Update! Removed Sonic.exe because the characters WON'T stop mentioning him, Imma make a Sonic.exe RP bot some other time because why not?)

He's still in the walls walls... Enjoy your time alive as long as it lasts...
